headline: Walmart Cuts Hundreds Of Corporate Jobs As AI-Driven Efficiency Push Accelerates: Report
summary: Walmart Inc. (NYSE:WMT) will eliminate or relocate 1,000 corporate workers as part of its plan to combine its global technology and product teams to boost efficiency. According to the Wall Street Journal report, the shift is tied to a broader effort to tighten internal coordination and place more teams inside the company's main office locations. headline: Bayer Partners with Luke Bryan to Donate 1 Million Meals Through Feeding America® to Expand Access to Food and Nutrition in Rural Communities
summary: WHIPPANY, N.J., May 13, 2026--Bayer and country superstar and five-time Entertainer of the Year Luke Bryan today launched their 2026 campaign to expand access to food and nutrition in rural America, with Bayer donating 1 million meals* through Feeding America®. The campaign kicks off May 14–16 in California with a Walmart community food drive in Clovis, followed by additional food collection at Farm Tour stops in Clovis and Elk Grove. In partnership with Central California Food Bank and Sacramen

The partnership extends Deere's presence from agricultural and construction equipment into consumer lifestyle and personal care. headline: Walmart Tightens Tech Structure To Deepen AI And Test Margin Story
summary: Walmart is restructuring its global technology and product teams, affecting about 1,000 corporate roles through eliminations and relocations. The company aims to consolidate tech and product functions, simplify its structure, and deepen its use of AI across operations. The changes are positioned as part of Walmart's push to operate more as a tech-driven retailer. For investors watching NasdaqGS:WMT, this internal reset comes with the stock trading around $130.35 and showing multi year share...
